name: fifa-stadium-hotel-planner
description: FIFA World Cup 26 U.S. stadium hotel planner: routed x402 Fanfare trip context plus routed MPP hotel discovery, reviews, distance scoring, and Google Map pins.

match_date.description: FIFA match date to enrich with Fanfare World Cup context.

team.description: Optional FIFA team filter for the Fanfare World Cup bundle.

origin_iata.description: Optional origin airport IATA code for Fanfare flight enrichment.

check_in.description: Hotel check-in date for trip and hotel offer enrichment.

check_out.description: Hotel check-out date for trip and hotel offer enrichment.

passengers.description: Passenger count for Fanfare flight enrichment.

venue_query.description: Common stadium name plus city/state, used for text searches and labels.

hotel_query.default: hotels near MetLife Stadium East Rutherford NJ
hotel_query.description: Search query for nearby hotel candidates.

hotel_address.default: Hyatt Place Secaucus Meadowlands, Secaucus, NJ
hotel_address.description: Selected hotel name/address for labels and route scoring.

place_id.description: Google Maps place_id for the selected hotel, taken from the text-search step results; drives the place-details and review steps.

venue_lat.description: Venue latitude for map, nearby search, and distance matrix steps.

venue_lng.description: Venue longitude for map, nearby search, and distance matrix steps.

hotel_lat.description: Selected hotel latitude for map and distance matrix steps.

hotel_lng.description: Selected hotel longitude for map and distance matrix steps.

radius_meters.description: Nearby-search radius around the stadium, in meters.

map_zoom.description: Google Static Maps zoom level for the stadium-plus-hotel preview.

steps.label: FIFA match and trip bundle - Fanfare (routed x402)
hotel candidates with coordinates — Google Maps (MPP/Tempo, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
hotel place details — Google Maps (MPP/Tempo, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
selected hotel reviews — Google Maps (MPP/Tempo, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
lodging near stadium - Google Places Nearby Search (routed MPP)
stadium to hotel walking distance - Google Maps Distance Matrix (routed MPP)
stadium and selected hotel pin map - Google Static Maps (routed MPP)
